overview: Functional medicine practice led by Dr. Alison Egeland that uncovers root causes of chronic illness using advanced functional medicine testing and naturopathic principles. The clinic provides personalized treatment plans for patients with complex health issues in Lafayette, Colorado.
highlights: Advanced functional medicine testing to identify hidden infections, inflammation, and imbalances
Naturopathic medicine and environmental medicine specialization
targetAudience: Patients with chronic or complex health conditions who have struggled to find answers through conventional medicine and seek a natural, root-cause approach to healing.
